reasoning: VIX at 21.47 (MID regime) rising 12.53% (≈2.4 point move from ~19 yesterday) — rapid fear buildup triggers bearish framework (change >1.5pts). Overnight gap flat (−$0.15), zero macro events today. However, sector rotation is risk-on (XLK +1.21%, XLF +0.86%, SPY +1.04%) and SPY ribbon bullish (78¢ spread, full bull stack) — creating a critical divergence. This is volatility expansion on nominal gains = distribution risk. Rising VIX + bullish price structure often precedes intraday reversals or consolidation. No hard no-trade windows; caution warranted on both entries.
